title: Talking Tables - Yellow Glass Candlestick Holder, Decorative Taper Candle Stand, Elegant Dinner Party Decorations, Easter Home Décor, Summer Birthday, Garden, Wedding (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

With its vibrant colour, this Yellow Glass Candlestick Holder by Talking Tables is sure to brighten up any indoor or outdoor space. Our tapered glass candle holders make for elegant and sophisticated table decorations whatever the occasion

A candlesticks holder is perfect for adding height to your next party tablescape, as table centrepieces for dining room or to add a pop of colour to your kitchen table, mantelpiece or fireplace as yellow home décor
SIZE - This yellow candle stand is 16cm high and holds 2cm candle width and depth. Ideal for stick candles or dinner candles

OCCASION - Candle stick candles are the perfect table decoration for a romantic candle lit dinner, dinner party with friends, summer nights in the garden, Sunday lunch, afternoon tea, Christmas or even a wedding! They also make lovely Mother's Day gifts for her
COLOURS - Our glass candlestick holders are also available in pink, orange, yellow, green, blue and red and can be paired with our matching colourful dinner candles
